name: KrisFlyer SBI Card Apex
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus KrisFlyer Miles on reaching Rs 5 Lakh in annual spends
KrisFlyer Elite Gold tier upgrade on spending Rs 7.5 Lakh or more on Singapore Airlines Group booking channels
3,000 bonus KrisFlyer Miles on cumulative annual spends of Rs 10 Lakh
additionalBenefits: 10,000 KrisFlyer Miles as welcome benefit after joining fee payment and first transaction within 60 days
additionalDetails: KrisFlyer Miles are automatically credited to the linked KrisFlyer account on each statement cycle date.
Complimentary Priority Pass membership included for primary cardholder.
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
KrisFlyer Miles are valid for 3 years from the date of credit to the linked account.
Priority Pass membership is complimentary for the primary cardholder for the first 2 card membership years.
International lounge visits beyond the complimentary limit or by guests are charged at USD 27 plus taxes per visit.
Upgrade to KrisFlyer Elite Gold requires spending at least Rs 7.5 Lakh directly on Singapore Airlines flights booked via the official website or mobile app.
Complimentary domestic and international lounge visits are capped at 2 visits per quarter.
Complimentary baggage delay cover up to Rs 1 Lakh and credit card fraud liability cover up to Rs 10 Lakh included.
Complimentary personal air accident cover up to Rs 1 Crore included.
